user.title: ČEZ Dynamic Tariff
user.description: Creates Home Assistant sensors from the fixed ČEZ dynamic tariff schedule.

data.name: Name
data.include_holidays: Treat Czech public holidays as weekend/holiday

data_description.base_price_kwh: Only the trading component price. Distribution, taxes and fixed fees are not included.

error.super_cheap_above_cheap: Super cheap threshold must be less than or equal to cheap threshold.
error.cheap_not_below_expensive: Cheap threshold must be lower than expensive threshold.

data.include_holidays: Treat Czech public holidays as weekend/holiday

data_description.cheap_threshold: Default -10 means both -10 % and -50 % windows are considered cheap.
data_description.super_cheap_threshold: Default -50 means only the -50 % window is considered super cheap.
data_description.expensive_threshold: Default 10 means both +10 % and +25 % windows are considered expensive.
